log.file: 1_The Reality of Being a Busy Adult.mp4

log.caption:
Nobody told me "being an adult" meant drinking coffee to stay awake and wine to fall asleep.

We're out here meal prepping on Sunday and ordering takeout by Tuesday. The laundry basket is now a dresser. Self-care is remembering to eat lunch 🙃

What's the adulting task you've completely given up on pretending you'll ever do consistently?

#adulting #adultingishard #busylife #millenniallife #adultstruggles #adultingfail #burnoutlife #corporatelife #worklifebalance #realtalk #relatable #adulthumor

log.file: 3_Stop Work Stress_ Dog Walks & Fake Commutes ACTUALLY Work!.mp4
log.caption:
Walking in circles around your block pretending you still have a life outside work? Welcome to the club.

Turns out pacing aimlessly while anxiety-spiraling is "self-care" now. We've rebranded dissociation as a wellness routine. 🚶‍♀️

Do you do the fake commute or just raw dog straight into emails at 6am?

#adulting #busylife #burnout #workfromhome #wfhlife #mentalhealthmatters #workstress #stressrelief #fakeittilyoumakeit #corporatelife #realtalk #relatable

log.file: 4_8-Hour Job Steals Your Life_ The Truth Revealed!.mp4
log.caption:
They call it "8 hours" but forget to mention the commute, lunch you eat at your desk, and the emails you answer at 9pm.

Spoiler: It's not 8 hours. It's your entire existence with a paycheck attached 💀

They really said "work-life balance" and gave us crumbs.

What's the longest you've gone without checking work messages on your day off?
